title: Upon Skinns. Epig.
content:
Skinns, he dined well to-day: how do you think?
    His nails they were his meat, his rheum the drink.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Skinns. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
